facts: LA 207 sensors / 4 months (Mar-Jun 2012); Bay 325 sensors / 6 months (Jan-May 2017); shared 5-min speed schema.
hypotheses: LA→Bay is a weak shift (both California freeway), exposing the threshold below which cross-city is indistinguishable from cross-fold.
Pair directionality is load-bearing: LA→Bay differs from Bay→LA.
The 5-year temporal offset injects incidental shift orthogonal to the spatial axis.
intuitions: Liu 2023 CIKM and ECML/PKDD 2024 cross-city baselines likely exist.
Cross-PEMS foundation-model results from 2024-25 likely exist.
unknowns: There is no established primitive for 'directional asymmetry of transfer' (A→B ≠ B→A); the pair relation is undirected by default.
